hero.headline: Senior Implementation Lead driving enterprise SaaS delivery at scale
hero.description: 20 complex enterprise SaaS implementations delivered end-to-end across the UK, US, and Middle East. 5+ years owning account-level delivery — from kickoff through go-live and hypercare. Expert at translating complex requirements into scalable configurations and measurable outcomes.

experience.title: Lead, Product Implementation
bullets: Owned 20 end-to-end enterprise CMMS/SaaS implementations at the account level — complete lifecycle ownership from kickoff through go-live and structured hypercare support.
Led workflow and solution design sessions with executives and operational teams; translated complex requirements into BRDs, scalable configurations, and WBS-based delivery plans.
Drove execution quality across accounts through rigorous SaaS configuration testing, validation readiness, and adoption-focused maintenance operations.
Managed account-level customer delivery and communication — running steering meetings, aligning senior stakeholders, and handling escalations as the internal voice of the customer.

highlights.label: Account-level delivery
highlights.text: Conceptualized a use-case-driven implementation framework with complexity scoring and effort models — enabling accurate scoping, auto-calculated timelines, and streamlined validation processes across multiple modules.

highlights.label: Scalable practices
highlights.text: Built tracking mechanisms for scope-change efforts and collaborated with Sales to introduce pre-purchased Professional Services credits — converting informal changes into structured billable units.

highlights.label: Enterprise delivery
highlights.text: Travelled on-site to Saudi Arabia for a half-million dollar engagement and to the UK for MHA — leading requirement gathering workshops, stakeholder alignment, and go-live training across UK, US, and Middle East markets.

highlights.label: Implementation outcomes
highlights.text: 4 of 5 pilots converted to full-scale enterprise rollouts through structured discovery, early value demonstration, and deep stakeholder alignment during pilot phases, driving $350K+ in expansion value.

highlights.label: Workflow design
highlights.text: Owned end-to-end requirements lifecycle — from scoping workshops with client stakeholders to documenting BRDs with solution designs. Worked cross-functionally to tailor configurations that best fit each client's operational workflow.

highlights.label: Platform coordination
highlights.text: Coordinated integration requirements across SSO (SAML/SCIM) and third-party platforms including Xero, CorrigoPro, Equiem, Wooqer, Bill.com, SiteFotos, and SFG20. Validated API feasibility and authored integration requirements for engineering teams.

experience.title: Senior Catalog Specialist
bullets: Managed and resolved complex catalog and procurement defects for Amazon Fresh, Amazon Pantry, and Prime Now — directly improving operational efficiency across multiple product lines.
Designed a defect prioritisation framework using product forecasts, inventory value, and glance views — yielding an estimated $230K in monthly savings through improved workflow efficiency.
Streamlined defect reduction processes by identifying SOP gaps, reducing invalid case assignments between support teams by ~50 per day through improved workflow design.

summary: Senior Implementation Lead with 5+ years owning complex enterprise SaaS implementations at the account level. Delivered 20 end-to-end rollouts across UK, US, and Middle East — from kickoff through go-live and structured hypercare. Expert at translating complex business requirements into scalable configurations, managing multi-stakeholder delivery, and building implementation practices that scale.

customSections.title: Enterprise Delivery Expertise
items: 20 enterprise SaaS implementations across UK, US, and Middle East markets
Half-million dollar engagement delivery with on-site stakeholder management
$4.1M+ total contract value delivered through structured implementation practices
Complex multi-module configuration and integration across third-party platforms
Process-heavy operational workflow design with CMMS and facility management focus
